description: 13F vs price divergence resolution. Reads 13F aggregate positions, compares against 60d price returns. BULLISH (instit adding + price down >=15%), BEARISH (instit selling + price up >=20%). Time-decay after 90d. Quality gate >$500M mcap. Edge basis: Wermers 2000, Cohen-Polk-Silli 2010. +18%/6mo BULL, -12%/6mo BEAR. Weekly Tue 06 UTC.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: 13F vs price divergence resolution weekly Tuesday 06 UTC
